category_sources: Official MPICH site tagline is High-Performance Portable MPI.
source_facts.description says implementation of the MPI Message Passing Interface standard.
display_name_sources: Official MPICH documentation and repository use MPICH capitalization.
docs_sources: Official MPICH Guides page links installers guide, users guide, README, FAQ, wiki, and developer docs.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is titled Official MPICH Repository.
Official MPICH site links GitHub for source changes and release timeline.
tags_sources: Official MPICH Guides page and repository describe MPI implementation and high-performance portable MPI.
